title: [BUG] Formules are not available
author: bodyajoy
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

## Steps To Reproduce

```javascript
cell.value.formula += `"blabla "&$E${i}-$D${i}&CHAR(10)`; //WORKED
cell.value.formula += `&"Rating "&IF(ROUND($G${i}; 1)=ROUND($F${i};1); "doesn't change"; "")&IF(ROUND($G${i}; 1)>ROUND($F${i};1); "raised "&ROUND($G${i}-$F${i};1); "")` //ERROR when open xlsx, but when you type this formula Excel works fine

```
IF - doesn't work in value.formula
How have I use formules for cells in Excel?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
1. About formules
Please use
`worksheet.getCell('A3').value = { formula: 'A1+A2', result: 7 };`

For result I recommend use 'undefined' - this will made calculation when file was opened in Excel

If you need calculate value of formula - it is out of scope of Exceljs. So it's required to use external lib like [Hyperformula](https://github.com/handsontable/hyperformula)

2. If it is working under Excel, please unzip working.xlsx and find this formula in worksheet1.xml

comments.author: bodyajoy
comments.body:
> 1. About formules
>    Please use
>    `worksheet.getCell('A3').value = { formula: 'A1+A2', result: 7 };`

When i write some excel formula there with "IF", "IFELSE" and other functions - document opens with error.

> If you need calculate value of formula - it is out of scope of Exceljs. So it's required to use external lib like [Hyperformula](https://github.com/handsontable/hyperformula)

I don't need calculating in my program, just in excel

> 1. If it is working under Excel, please unzip working.xlsx and find this formula in worksheet1.xml

Don't understand this advice

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
> > If it is working under Excel, please unzip working.xlsx and find this formula in worksheet1.xml

> Don't understand this advice

1. Create file in Microsoft Excel with expected formula,
2. Save as `file.xlsx`
3. Rename  from `file.xlsx` into `file.zip`, 
4. Unzip into dir `./file`
5. Go into `./file/xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml` 
6. Should find something like that: `<f>IF(A1>0, B1,"Jak się masz?")</f>`
7. It is sure that `IF(A1>0, B1,"Jak się masz?")`  is correct value for formulas

comments.author: bodyajoy
comments.body:
> 7\. It is sure that `IF(A1>0, B1,"Jak się masz?")`  is correct value for formulas

```xml
<c r="J5" s="6" t="str">
<f>
"Написано положительных отзывов: "&$G5-$F5&CHAR(10)&"Рейтинг "&IF(ROUND($I5,1)=ROUND($H5,1),"не изменился","")&IF(ROUND($I5,1)<ROUND($H5,1),"упал на "&ROUND($H5-$I5, 1),"")&IF(ROUND($I5,1)>ROUND($H5,1),"вырос на "&ROUND($I5-$H5, 1),"")
</f>
<v>
Написано положительных отзывов: -2 Рейтинг упал на 4.3
</v>
</c>
```

```javascript
mysheet.getCell(`J5`).value = {
    formula: `Написано положительных отзывов: "&$G5-$F5&CHAR(10)&"Рейтинг "&IF(ROUND($I5,1)=ROUND($H5,1),"не изменился","")&IF(ROUND($I5,1)<ROUND($H5,1),"упал на "&ROUND($H5-$I5, 1),"")&IF(ROUND($I5,1)>ROUND($H5,1),"вырос на "&ROUND($I5-$H5, 1),"")`,
    result: `Написано положительных отзывов: -2 Рейтинг упал на 4.3`,
  };
```

still works when set up formula from excel, but gets error from js

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
@bodyajoy thank you for recognize this bug

Could you paste full error ?

comments.author: bodyajoy
comments.body: I hope you could solve that problem

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
:) I don't understand what was written there. 
1. Could you change langue to English or translate?
2. Could you do same thing like here: https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/1355#issuecomment-651315076 (steps 3-6) for generated file?

comments.author: bodyajoy
comments.body:
> :) I don't understand what was written there.
![Screenshot_5](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33304441/86403873-3b691180-bcb7-11ea-8923-2f97908d0c91.jpg)
![Screenshot_6](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33304441/86403876-3c01a800-bcb7-11ea-9281-cbf8722b3b9f.jpg)
![Screenshot_4](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33304441/86403877-3c9a3e80-bcb7-11ea-98c2-89b4ffb6da46.jpg)




> 2\. Could you do same thing like here:
```xml
<f>
"Написано положительных отзывов: "&$G6-$F6&CHAR(10)&"Рейтинг "&IF(ROUND($I6,1)=ROUND($H6,1),"не изменился","")&IF(ROUND($I6,1)<ROUND($H6,1),"упал на "&ROUND($H6-$I6, 1),"")&IF(ROUND($I6,1)>ROUND($H6,1),"вырос на "&ROUND($I6-$H6, 1),"")
</f>
<v>
Написано положительных отзывов: -5 Рейтинг упал на 4.3
</v>
```

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
Thank you for translation :)

It's strange because the only difference what I see it's a shift by one cell down (G6 instead of G5, I6 instead I5, etc.) 

has it any meaning?

comments.author: bodyajoy
comments.body:
> has it any meaning?

No, its just others cells)
Columns are the same
